title: Wigs & Masks
description: Allow you to rename carved pumpkin and get various wigs & masks in game
body:
### This resource pack allow you to rename carved pumpkin and get various wigs and masks in game.
No mod needed, just an anvil and a carved pumpkin.
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5d4a1329c6beb44910d8b4e7fc2ba5dac7279c6.webp)
# 🔍 How to Use
**1.** download this resource pack and place it into your _resourcepack folder_

**2.** use an **anvil** to rename the _carved pumpkin_
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b34620cbc978c9b436f008e8342a7cea4162f576.webp)

### Here are available models you can use currently:
|Available Model|Imports|
|-|:-:|
|1a|1a, saki|
|1b|1b, uika|
|1c|1c, mtm|
|1d|1d, umr|
|1e|1e, nym|
|2a|2a, anon|
|2b|2b, tmr|
|2c|2c, rana|
|2d|2d, soyo|
|2e|2e, taki|
|01|01, hina|
|947|947|
|steve1|steve1|

# ❗ Attention
This resource pack remove the **overlay texture** used in carved pumpkin, so it might conflict with other resource packs.
